name: sdd-workflow
description: Two-agent SDD workflow with a planning architect and a plan-driven developer.

interface.shortDescription: Plan first with an architect, then implement with a plan-driven developer
interface.longDescription: Use SDD Workflow to split delivery into two focused agents: SDD Architect creates an implementable plan from requirements, and SDD Developer executes code changes strictly from the approved plan with validation.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use SDD Architect to create an implementation plan, then use SDD Developer to implement that approved plan.
